meeting.track_notes: Poly. 2000m track inside the turf circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. Turf. 2800m triangular-shaped circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. DRAW: Poly: Low-number

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets GREYVILLE WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MEEKSHA attracted betting support but found one better. She has shown up well in both starts and did well on Poly debut so has a fair chance of scoring. TIGER CODY made marked improvement in first-time blinkers and can go one better. He shows good pace and should prefer the surface. KIKI U BEAUTY had things go wrong last time. He can get closer. THUN- DER STAR found some market support last run and the switch to the poly could see improvement. RACHEL’S BOY was not far back on debut and must be watched.

races.race_name: BET WITH TOTE MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: GIMME THE POWER showed up well first run over course and distance. She has been competitive of late and while a win has been elusive, it could be the right race. GREEK HEIR- ESS has run well on the poly and improved with the blinkers removed last run. She has drawn well and should again give a good account of herself. SPLASH OF LOVE has the form needed to win but a wide draw is a concern. QUEEN’S BOUNTY caught the eye last time and may prefer the extra. Fellow juvenile INDIGNATION has a few lengths to find but she must relish the extra ground on pedigree.

races.race_name: JOIN THE PASSION! www.racecoast.co.za C STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Wide open. HUNGA TONGA has her first start on the poly but won well on her local debut and can follow up. PRINCE OF TROY wasn’t much of a threat from a wide draw last time. He could have every chance this time. HIGH QUEUE has run some fair races on the poly but the drop to the 1600m trip could be what he is looking for. TAKEYOURBESTSHOT should have the run of the race from gate one and must be included along with EL REY VIENE who is very capable on the surface. LILTING SONG takes on males and did well from a wide draw last time out. She has upset potential.

races.race_name: ONLINE FORM GUIDE www.gallop.co.za D STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: RAGNAR THE KING has a wide draw but looked threatening in his last run and perhaps just needs to get the timing right. He should be at a peak in his third run after a rest. CIRCLE OF GRACE got back to winning ways on the Highveld last time. He is also effective on the Poly and must be afforded the utmost respect now. SHINY BOB has a win to come but has battled to get to the horses upfront. He has drawn well, has a 4kg appy claim and could get closer. DOUBLE OLYMPIC was close-up behind his stable companion Mohandas last time out and a repeat can see him make the frame.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: INTREPID was allocated a big weight but a 4kg apprentice claim should make things easier. He has drawn well and should be in the fight. LITTLE CRACKER suddenly made all to win in good style last time out. He has gone up just three points in merit ratings and could be one to catch again. TRAFALGAR SQUARE goes well over course and distance and is never far back. VICTOR RAIL has put in two smart recent efforts against stronger but does go up in the weights. TAKE YOUR PLACE has dropped in the handicap and gets blinkers. More can earn.

races.race_name: JOIN THE RACE COAST TURF CLUB TODAY! PROGRESS PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: POWERANDTHEGLORY has the widest draw to contend with but has some solid form in top class company and trying blinkers could be right there if taking to the poly. VAPOUR TRAIL is another fair sort that gets first-time blinkers. His last two starts are not inspiring but he can make big improvement. HAH LAH LAH is unbeaten in two and beat a useful sort in JP’s Pal- ace on the Poly. He could find it tough at these weights but looks progressive. GOOD FOR YOU is smart on his day and much better than his last two. He can surprise. Keep an eye on talented SAUDI CAT too.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH MYSTIC FORTUNE CLASS 4 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: LA LANDONNE has won her last two and goes on the poly for the first time. She got a five-point merit rating increase but won impressively and may be up to the task. SIBERIAN WINTER is long overdue. She goes well over course and distance and can score. PRINCESS GOLDIE was running on well under a big weight last run. She does take on stronger but has a handy weight from the best draw. LAST CAR TO PASS has her first outing for a new stable but has steady Highveld form. She does have a big weight and a wide draw on her poly debut.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: ULTRA QUICK held on gamely to win last time out. He only got two points for that win with the apprentice up. In-form Keagan de Melo now gets the ride. MEERKAT MOON has improved in blinkers and has run on the poly. The form of his last run has held up with The Gliding Fish winning straight after. NAVAJO DANCER needed his last run and has run well on the poly. He has a wide draw but a light weight. DAPPER had every chance behind ULTRA QUICK last start but just didn’t go on with it. He is 4kg better off and may prefer the shorter trip. More in it - go wide.
